payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark glossy leather padded chair back (approx. 0.5 m from camera) showing rounded top edge, pronounced vertical creases and seam lines, and a wrinkled, slightly reflective surface; only the upper back portion is visible and edge-cropped.
